prestazioni: Engine: N18B16C (1.6L turbocharged inline-4) – Full forged internals with Mahle Motorsport forged pistons (8.5:1 CR), Manley H-beam connecting rods, and ACL Race Series bearings for 30+ psi boost capability
Turbocharger: Garrett GTX3076R Gen II with billet compressor wheel, 0.82 A/R turbine housing, and TiAL MV-R 44mm wastegate for 400+ HP on E85 (stock location hybrid setup)
Fuel System: Injector Dynamics ID1050x injectors, Bosch Motorsport 044 high-flow fuel pump, and AEM 340029 2000cc/min port injection kit with custom fuel rail adapters for dual-injection
estetica: Aero: WRC-style carbon fiber front splitter by MINI Challenge homologated parts supplier (OMP Racing) with integrated dive planes and rear diffuser extension for 150kg+ downforce at 120mph
Body: Full carbon fiber widebody conversion using MINI JCW Challenge-spec fender flares (2.5" wider front, 3" wider rear) with custom carbon fiber hood featuring NACA ducts for turbo cooling
Wheels: OZ Racing Superleggera Challenge 17x8 ET20 (front) and 17x9.5 ET25 (rear) with custom center-lock adapters, wrapped in Pirelli P Zero Trofeo R 225/45/17 and 255/40/17 tires
